base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of die_to_fire_transformation_colors — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Star-power invulnerability palette cycle — 5 colors loop left-to-right during invuln. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Star-power invulnerability palette cycle — 5 colors loop left-to-right during invuln; restart at player's base color after full loop (same palette machinery drives fire-up animation)
